news.headline: Graham Corp (NYSE: GHM) to hold Q2 FY2025 financial results conference call and webcast in Batavia, NY.
news.summary: Graham Corporation, traded on NYSE as GHM, has disclosed plans for a conference call and webcast to discuss its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025. The call will provide an opportunity for stakeholders to delve into key figures and projections. This event signifies the company's commitment to transparency and communication with shareholders and analysts.

news.headline: MarineMax to present Q4 & FY 2024 financials on Oct 31, 2024. Company plans conference call at 10 am ET.CEO Brett McGill, CFO Mike McLamb to host.
news.summary: MarineMax, Inc., the leading company in recreational boating services, is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of fiscal 2024 prior to the opening of the New York Stock Exchange on Thursday, October 31, 2024. The company's ticker on the NYSE is HZO. The conference call, hosted by CEO and President Brett McGill and CFO Mike McLamb, will take place at 10:00 a.m. ET on the same day. MarineMax operates as the world's biggest provider for boat, yacht, and superyacht services.

news.headline: Global Partners LP to announce Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 8, 2024. Conference call at 10AM ET with CEO, CFO, and COO. Dial (877) 7.
news.summary: WALTHAM, Mass.-- Global Partners LP (NYSE: GLP) disclosed its upcoming release of third-quarter 2024 financial results set for Friday, November 8, 2024, before the market opens. The Partnership will be hosting a conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET on the same day for investors and analysts. The call, led by Eric Slifka (President and CEO), Gregory B. Hanson (CFO), and Mark Romaine (COO), can be joined by dialing (877) 7 xxx xxx.

news.headline: Luxury brand Perfect Moment (NYSE: PMNT) opens first U.S. distribution center in Dallas through partnership with Quiet Platforms.
news.summary: Perfect Moment Ltd., a luxury skiwear brand known for blending technical expertise with fashion-forward designs, recently inaugurated its initial warehouse and distribution hub in Dallas, Texas. The company's first U.S.-based center, in collaboration with Quiet Platforms, a prominent provider of fulfillment centers and last-mile delivery services, aims to enhance Perfect Moment's order processing and efficiency. Traded on NYSE American as PMNT, the brand is recognized for its high performance and elegance.

news.headline: Four Inc. partners with Fortinet Federal to deliver cybersecurity solutions to public sector, serving as a federal aggregator.
news.summary: In Herndon, Virginia on October 24, 2024, Four Inc. has been designated as a federal aggregator for Fortinet Federal Inc., a reputable supplier of advanced cybersecurity products for government entities. This partnership entails Four Inc. distributing Fortinet Federal solutions to the public sector.

news.headline: NeuroSense Therapeutics reports positive results for PrimeC in ALS with significant improvement in key miRNAs. Hope for ALS treatment.
news.summary: A significant development in ALS treatment is being seen through the revolutionary PARADIGM Trial, conducted by NeuroSense Therapeutics Ltd. in Cambridge, Massachusetts. The company, listed on Nasdaq as NRSN, specializes in innovative therapies for severe neurodegenerative conditions. The trial holds promise for transforming ALS treatment, with groundbreaking implications for patients worldwide. The study's outcomes are being closely monitored as it progresses to potentially revolutionize treatment methods for this debilitating disease.

news.headline: Sabre adds 900+ Premier Inn hotels to its lodging platform in UK, Ireland, and Germany; expands global content.
news.summary: Sabre Corporation, a prominent software and technology provider (NASDAQ: SABR), has made over 900 Premier Inn Hotels across the UK, Ireland, and Germany accessible through their Content Services for Lodging platform. This move, announced on October 24, 2024, enables users to access a wide range of lodging options through Sabre's platform.

news.headline: AudioEye to hold Q3 earnings call on Nov 7, 2024 at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. Company's stock is listed as Nasdaq: AEYE.
news.summary: A conference call is scheduled to be held by AudioEye, Inc. (Nasdaq: AEYE), the prominent digital accessibility company based in Tucson, Arizona, on November 7, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. The purpose of this call is to discuss the company's financial performance for the third quarter of the year.

news.headline: Innovative Eyewear, Inc. (NASDAQ: LUCY; LUCYW) received a patent allowance notice for its smart eyewear technology.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, in Miami, Innovative Eyewear, Inc., a company trading under the tickers NASDAQ: LUCY and NASDAQ: LUCYW, known for their smart eyewear products sold under brands Lucyd®, Nautica®, Eddie Bauer®, and Reebok®, was granted a notice of allowance for its utility patent.

news.headline: Nature's Miracle Holding Inc. launches NM Rebate Inc. to drive LED lighting sales, boost margins.(PR: Oct. 24, 2024)
news.summary: A new Rebate Division is set to be launched by Nature's Miracle Holding Inc. (NASDAQ: NMHI) in Ontario, California on October 24, 2024. This move is anticipated to increase sales and margins for the company as the program will help cover the costs associated with installing LED products. Nature's Miracle Holding Inc. is a renowned player in the field of vertical farming. This strategic initiative is likely to have a positive impact on the company's financial performance by offsetting expenses related to LED product installations.

news.headline: Allison Transmission expanding manufacturing facility in India by 200,000 sq ft, operational by 2027.
news.summary: A 200,000 square-foot expansion project is set to be finished by 2025, and the facility is anticipated to be fully operational by 2026. The manufacturing capacity is expected to ramp up to its maximum by 2027. Allison Transmission has officially disclosed the development of its cutting-edge production facility located in Indianapolis.

news.headline: Tivic Health CEO Jennifer Ernst to speak at BioFuture 2024 in NY on Oct. 29 at 2:30 p.m., focusing on bioelectronic medicine.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Tivic Health® Systems, Inc. (Nasdaq: TIVC), a leading health tech company in bioelectronic medicine, revealed that CEO Jennifer Ernst is scheduled to speak at the BioFuture 2024 Conference in New York. The event will take place from October 28 to October 30. Ms. Ernst's presentation, set for Tuesday, October 29 at 2:30 p.m. EDT, will delve into the company's progress in bioelectronic medicine. This includes the latest findings on a novel technique for vagus nerve stimulation.

news.headline: Farmmi, Inc. in China expands logistic services with subsidiary Farmmi USA INC., in cooperation with Mazon Technology LLC.
news.summary: In Lishui, China, on October 24, 2024, Farmmi, Inc. ("Farmmi"), a leading agriculture products supplier in China listed on NASDAQ under the ticker FAMI, disclosed that its subsidiary, FARMMI USA INC. ("Farmmi USA"), has preliminarily agreed with Mazon Technology LLC.

news.headline: 82% of US residents support caps on rent hikes, according to study by Redfin, Ipsos, & NASDAQ: RDFN.
news.summary: In Seattle, a recent survey commissioned by Redfin revealed that 82% of U.S. residents support the idea of implementing caps on rent increases. The survey, conducted by Ipsos in September 2024, collected data from 1,802 individuals aged 18-65, including 188 respondents from California. The findings reflect a strong sentiment towards regulating landlords' ability to raise rent prices. This highlights a widespread concern among the public regarding rising housing costs, with the majority advocating for measures to address affordability issues in the housing market.

news.headline: Clear Secure, Inc. (NYSE: YOU) to reveal Q3 financial results on Nov. 7, 2024: data to be shared at 6:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Clear Secure, Inc. (NYSE: YOU) will release its financial results for the third quarter ending September 30, 2024, at around 6:00 a.m. ET on Thursday, November 7. The announcement will be followed by a conference at 8:00 a.m. ET.

news.headline: Space Development Agency chooses LeoStella & BlackSky for Low-Earth Orbit program. #HybridAcquisition #Proliferation.
news.summary: LeoStella and BlackSky have been chosen by the Space Development Agency to assist in the Hybrid Acquisition for Proliferated Low-Earth Orbit program. The selection was made in Tukwila, Washington. This collaboration involves the use of artificial intelligence and is expected to bring significant advancements in space technology.

news.headline: Baird's research models now on Bloomberg Terminal for bank's buy-side clients, enhancing workflow solutions.
news.summary: Buy-side clients of a bank now have convenient access to research models through their workflow solutions. In a recent announcement on Oct. 24, 2024, Baird and Bloomberg revealed that Baird's research models are now accessible on the Bloomberg Terminal. This partnership allows the bank's buy-side clients to enhance their research capabilities with these models.

news.headline: OSI Systems reports record Q1 revenues and non-GAAP earnings per share in fiscal 2025 under CEO Deepak Chopra.
news.summary: A California-based company, OSI Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: OSIS), has revealed its financial performance for the initial quarter of fiscal 2025. CEO Deepak Chopra expressed satisfaction with the strong start to the fiscal year, noting record-breaking Q1 revenues and non-GAAP earnings per share. The company credited the outstanding growth in its Security division for these impressive results. Chopra highlighted the robust backlog and high visibility into future performance as positive indicators for the company's trajectory.

news.headline: Dr. Allan Harrington, with 35 years of dermatology experience, joins WellAve Dermatology as Chief Medical Officer.
news.summary: An esteemed Mohs Surgeon with more than 35 years of experience in dermatology, Dr. Allan Harrington, has recently become the Chief Medical Officer of WellAve Dermatology in Annapolis, Maryland on October 24, 2024. This exciting addition brings a wealth of expertise to the team.

news.headline: Yoto expands into Target stores nationwide, bringing best-selling products to a wider market.
news.summary: Yoto, the popular interactive audio platform for children, has recently revealed a new collaboration that will see their best-selling products available at Target stores across the country. This exclusive retail partnership will feature the highly praised Yoto Player, along with other acclaimed Yoto products. The company made this announcement on October 24, 2024, and has expressed excitement for this expansion of their reach. This strategic move aims to make the beloved Yoto products more accessible to a wider audience, with the ultimate goal of bringing their innovative audio platform to more households.

news.headline: Fintech investment bank Wellesley Hills Financial adds two new executive advisors, Michelle Beyo and Onur Haytac. Beyo is CEO of Finavator, focusing on fintech and payments.
news.summary: Wellesley Hills Financial, an international investment bank and strategic advisory firm based in Newton, Mass., has recently expanded its Executive Advisory team by welcoming two seasoned professionals in the payments and fintech industries. Michelle Beyo, the Founder and CEO of Finavator, a consultancy in Toronto specializing in fintech, payments, and open finance, has joined the team. Beyo also serves as an Advisory Board Member for various fintech companies. In addition, Onur Haytac has been appointed as an Executive Advisor. The firm continues to strengthen its expertise with these strategic additions.

news.headline: Massimo showcases growth and innovation at 2024 Equip Expo in Louisville, KY, focusing on motor sports vehicles. NASDAQ: MAMO, Oct. 24.
news.summary: The recent Motor Sports Vehicles Expo in Garland, Texas on October 24, 2024, showcased a significant interest in these vehicles, indicating a promising market for business expansion. Massimo Group (NASDAQ: MAMO), known for manufacturing and distributing powersports vehicles and pontoon boats, was a key player at the expo. This event highlighted growth opportunities for the industry in the coming years.

news.headline: Tempus (NASDAQ: TEM) to report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 7, with earnings call at 4:30 p.m. ET featuring CEO & CFO.
news.summary: Tempus AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: TEM), a renowned firm in artificial intelligence and precision medicine, is set to disclose its financial outcomes for the third quarter on November 7, 2024. The third quarter 2024 earnings conference call is scheduled at 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day, where the company’s quarterly earnings will be unveiled. Leading the call will be Tempus Founder and CEO, Eric Lefkofsky, alongside Chief Financial Officer, Jim Rogers. Those interested can participate in the live audio webcast.

news.headline: 3iQ, a digital asset management firm based in Toronto, rebrands to provide safe digital asset investment products for institutional investors.
news.summary: A digital asset management firm, 3iQ Digital Asset Management, based in Toronto, has revealed a strategic rebranding effort to highlight its dedication to offering institutional-grade digital assets to a wider audience. The company's rebranding emphasizes its ongoing goal of delivering safe, user-friendly, and secure investment options tailored to the requirements of contemporary institutional investors. This initiative follows 3iQ's latest announcement, showcasing a commitment to expanding accessibility to digital assets.

news.headline: LightPath Technologies, Inc. has secured a Letter of Intent for the sustained supply of infrared lens assemblies from an existing European defense customer, expanding their partnership for product development, manufacturing localization in Europe, and volume commitments.
news.summary: LightPath Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: LPTH) has announced an expansion of its partnership through a Letter of Intent for product development and manufacturing localization in Europe. This move is part of their strategy to strengthen their presence in the region. The agreement includes volume commitments that are set to enhance their production capabilities. The Company, known as a top provider in the industry, aims to leverage this partnership to further establish their position in the market. This development comes after the announcement made on October 24, 2024, in Orlando, Florida.

news.headline: Central Texas MLS is 7th in TX to partner with RentSpree, reaching nearly 100,000 agents. RentSpree is top-rated rental software.
news.summary: RentSpree has collaborated with CTXMLS, making it the seventh organization in the state to join forces with the rental software provider. This partnership expands RentSpree's network to nearly 100,000 agents in the state. The announcement was made on October 24, 2024, in Los Angeles. RentSpree is recognized as the leading rental software provider in the U.S.

news.headline: Skyhawk Therapeutics presents promising data on SKY-1214, a first-in-class RNA splicing modulator, showing tumor regression in mouse models.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, Skyhawk Therapeutics, Inc. announced promising results for SKY-1214, an IND-ready first-in-class FANCL/FANCI RNA splicing modulator. In preclinical trials, SKY-1214 showed tumor growth inhibition and regression to undetectable levels in xenograft mouse models of Non-Hodgkin's Lymphoma (NHL) and hard-to-treat Multiple Myeloma (MM). These results suggest potential effectiveness against cancers that are challenging to treat. This development marks a significant advancement in the field of oncology research, with the potential to impact a notable number of patients grappling with these types of malignancies.

news.headline: Holly Farrell named General Manager/COO of The Oaks Club, becoming first woman in its 40-year history.
news.summary: Holly Farrell (CCM) has made history by becoming the first woman to hold the top position in The Oaks Club's 40-year history. Based in Osprey, Florida, she has been appointed as the General Manager and Chief Operating Officer of the prestigious private country club community. The club spans over 1,000 acres, marking an important milestone in gender diversity within the organization.

news.headline: National OnDemand, Inc. joins Fiber Broadband Association as Premier member to boost broadband access and digital equity.
news.summary: National OnDemand, Inc. has demonstrated its dedication to the Fiber Broadband Association by attaining Premier membership status in efforts to enhance broadband access and support digital equity. This announcement was made in Burlington, N.C. on October 24, 2024. National OnDemand, Inc. aims to further these goals through its increased involvement.

news.headline: Breakthrough in self-compliant memristive devices for neuromorphic computing reported in Seoul. AI and IoT advancements are driving progress in various fields.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, as of October 24, 2024, significant progress has been made in the realms of artificial intelligence (AI) and the Internet of Things (IoT). These advancements have spurred developments in speech recognition, image classification for autonomous vehicles, and the creation of large language models such as ChatGPT. These technologies have seen a rapid growth in recent years, showcasing their potential in various fields.

news.headline: Kharon has launched an API for dynamic exposure scores, offering real-time global risk insights for businesses.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on October 24, 2024, Kharon, an expert in data analytics and technology, introduced a new API that gives businesses and institutions immediate access to Kharon's core for up-to-the-minute global risk insights. This highly anticipated API release opens up opportunities for real-time data analytics, empowering users to make informed decisions swiftly.

news.headline: Global pet food ingredients market predicted to grow from USD 34.2 billion in 2023 to USD 47.4 billion by 2028 at a CAGR of 6.8%, fueled by premiumization and increased pet ownership.
news.summary: The global pet food ingredients market is expected to grow significantly, increasing from USD 34.2 billion in 2023 to USD 47.4 billion by 2028 at a CAGR of 6.8%. Factors driving this growth include the rising demand for premium and specialty pet foods and the increase in pet ownership, particularly in urban areas. The emotional connection between pet owners and their pets is leading to higher expenditure on pet care, with a focus on high-quality and diverse ingredients. This trend is encouraging manufacturers to provide innovative and high-end ingredients to meet the evolving demands of modern pet owners.

news.headline: MPAA expands electrical and brake coverage with 505 new part numbers, now covers 302 million vehicles.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Motorcar Parts of America, Inc. (Nasdaq: MPAA) disclosed the expansion of its product range, now offering over 505 new part numbers across various programs including starter & alternator, brake caliper, pad, shoe, power brake booster, and rotor. These additions increase coverage for 302 million vehicles in operation. The new parts are available under QB, Quality-Built, Quality-Built Black Series, and Pure Energy brands powered by MPA, catering to professional installers.

news.headline: Stilo marks 25 years with event in Italy, highlighting safety and racing excellence.
news.summary: Stilo, a part of the Holley Performance Brands family listed on NYSE as HLLY, commemorated its 25th anniversary in Bergamo, Italy. The event, themed “Forever, Ahead,” took place at their expanded global headquarters and was attended by Stilo dealers worldwide. Participants celebrated the brand's legacy and its commitment to safety, quality, and performance in racing over a two-day period. The company views safety and racing as key pillars for its growth strategy.

news.headline: US Continued Jobless Claims Actual 1.897M (Forecast 1.875M, Previous 1.867M)
Chicago National Activity Index Actual -0.28 (Forecast 0.5, Previous 0.12)
US Initial Jobless Claims Actual 227k (Forecast 241.5k, Previous 241k, Revision 242k)
Stablecoins to revolutionize finance, reduce international wires to 'minutes or seconds.' CEO predicts major role in global markets.
news.summary: Eric Chen, CEO of Injective Labs, predicts that stablecoins are poised to revolutionize various industries and play a vital role in major financial operations. In an interview with Benzinga, Chen highlighted how stablecoins are reshaping mainstream finance by enhancing transaction speed and accessibility on a global scale. He envisions stablecoins becoming central to processes like cross-border payments and capital formation, potentially reducing international transfers to mere minutes or seconds. While initially associated with trading, stablecoins are now seen as a means to address inefficiencies in traditional financial systems, providing quicker and more secure transactions compared to systems like SWIFT. Chen believes stablecoins will have a significant impact beyond the realm of cryptocurrency trading.

news.headline: In two weeks, Trump and Harris are tied in a close race - reports show.
UPM Biomedicals launches FibGel™, world's 1st injectable nanocellulose hydrogel for medical devices.
news.summary: UPM Biomedicals, a leading producer of high-quality nanofibrillar cellulose for medical and life science uses, unveiled FibGel™ on Oct. 24, 2024. FibGel is a natural injectable hydrogel designed for permanent implantable medical devices, marking a significant development in the industry.

news.headline: Errante integrates with TradingView, allowing trading directly from charts. Offers MT4, MT5, cTrader. Cyprus, Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: In Limassol, Cyprus, on October 24, 2024, Errante made a significant announcement regarding their direct integration with TradingView, the leading charting platform and trader community globally. This development allows traders to seamlessly trade through Errante directly from TradingView charts. Errante offers compatibility with popular trading platforms such as MT4, MT5, and cTrader, enhancing accessibility and convenience for their users. This partnership showcases Errante's commitment to providing a user-friendly and efficient trading experience, catering to the diverse needs of traders in the financial market.

news.headline: Tazama and ArangoDB partner to enhance fraud detection, protecting billions in digital transactions worldwide.
news.summary: In an innovative effort to combat financial fraud on a global scale, Tazama, a project under the Linux Foundation, has partnered with ArangoDB. This collaboration aims to enhance real-time fraud detection in digital payment systems. The initiative, announced in San Francisco on October 24, 2024, signifies a significant step forward in the fight against financial crimes. The partnership leverages ArangoDB's expertise to bolster Tazama's capabilities, ensuring more robust protection against fraudulent activities. This move reflects the commitment to enhancing security measures in the digital payment sector.

news.headline: Bitcoin's rally pauses at $67,000 amid mixed signals on price trajectory. $192M inflow in BTC spot ETFs, $317M in BlackRock's ETF. Ethereum ETFs saw $1.27M inflow. Analysts observe trends for impact on prices. Chief market analyst states market rebounds after dip. If Bitcoin breaks $69,500 resistance, bullish momentum expected.
news.summary: Market analysts are divided on the future price of Bitcoin (BTC), with some emphasizing strong fundamentals and others warning about technical indicators. On Oct. 23, Bitcoin spot ETFs experienced a $192 million inflow, with BlackRock's (IBIT) ETF attracting a significant $317 million. Ethereum spot ETFs saw a smaller inflow of $1.27 million. Analysts are monitoring these trends closely for potential impact on price movements. Alex Kuptsikevich, FxPro's chief market analyst, highlighted the recent market rebound post a dip earlier in the week. He stated that Bitcoin's intraday performance is positive, noting the importance of breaking through the $69,500 resistance level.

news.headline: Anumana partners with AMP Heart Failure program to advance ECG-AI™ research in heart disease treatments.
news.summary: Anumana, based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, has recently become a part of the AMP Heart Failure program. This collaboration aims to further research on ECG-AI™ technology to enhance the development of innovative treatments for heart disease. The move signifies a crucial step in advancing cardiovascular health.

news.headline: Henry Repeating Arms auctioning 1-of-1 rifle to benefit veterans at Stand Up for Heroes event on Veteran's Day.
news.summary: Proceeds from the event will go towards supporting the Bob Woodruff Foundation during their 18th annual Stand Up for Heroes Veteran's Day event. Taking place in Rice Lake, Wisconsin on October 24, 2024, this event is organized by Henry Repeating Arms, a top firearms manufacturer in the country and a global pioneer in lever-action firearms.

news.headline: Report by Beverage Marketing examines US bottled water market through 2028, covering brands like Nestle and Coca-Cola - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A recent report on the U.S. bottled water market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report covers the period through 2028 and provides comprehensive insights into this major beverage category. It examines various segments including sparkling, non-sparkling, imports, HOD, branded, and private label products. The report analyzes the factors contributing to the growth of the market, its competitive landscape, and emerging trends. Bottled water is highlighted as the largest beverage category by volume in the U.S., indicating its resilience and continuous expansion.

news.headline: Qatar's Foreign Minister: US negotiators will meet Israeli negotiators in Doha in an effort to reach a breakthrough.
Spectrum Healthcare Partners brings AI-enabled scanners to Central Maine Healthcare for advancing pathology services.
news.summary: In South Portland, Maine, Spectrum Healthcare Partners and Central Maine Healthcare are partnering to enhance pathology services with the help of Pramana’s AI-powered SpectralHT scanners. This collaboration aims to improve efficiency and accuracy in diagnostics through autonomous technology.

news.headline: FREYR Battery granted €122 million by EU Innovation Fund for CAM project in Finland.
news.summary: FREYR Battery, Inc. (NYSE: FREY), a company specializing in sustainable battery and clean energy solutions, announced today that the European Union Innovation Fund (EUIF) has granted €122 million to support FREYR's joint venture Cathode Active Material (CAM) manufacturing project in Vaasa, Finland. This grant will aid in the development of the project, highlighting the company's commitment to innovation and sustainability. The grant was confirmed by FREYR this morning, expressing gratitude for the opportunity.

news.headline: Columbia Banking System, Inc. reports Q3 2024 results: $146M net income, $143M operating income, $0.70 EPS. CEO commentary positive.
news.summary: In Tacoma, Washington, as of October 24, 2024, a total of $146 million in net income and $143 million in operating net income were reported. The earnings per diluted common share were $0.70, with operating earnings per diluted common share at $0.69. The CEO commented on the third-quarter results, stating that their ongoing efforts had led to success in various endeavors.
